meaning: n.云雀,百灵鸟,灰黄色,诗人,嬉戏,玩乐vi.嬉耍,戏弄,骑马玩乐vt.愚弄
examples: She was called the Lark in the neighborhood.
Cosette, the lark, as she is called hereabouts!
A noise was audible in the house; it was the Lark sweeping the stairs.
You can still enter your name for a chance to win a free LARK. Questions?
What started out as a lark quickly became the hottest mascot on the West Coast.
